# Cakish — Handcrafted Pavlova | Wicklow, Ireland

> Cakish is a premium home bakery based in Wicklow, Ireland. We handcraft modern pavlova desserts to order for birthdays, communions, anniversaries, and celebrations. Collection from Wicklow only.

## About Cakish

Cakish creates handcrafted pavlova desserts built on a crisp meringue base, layered with Dulce de Leche or Nutella, finished with hand-piped cream and fresh seasonal fruit. Every pavlova is made fresh to order. We take a limited number of orders each week to ensure every pavlova receives full attention.

- **Location**: Wicklow, Ireland
- **Fulfilment**: Collection only from Wicklow (exact address shared after order confirmation)
- **Contact**: hello@cakish.ie | Instagram: @cakish.ie | WhatsApp available
- **Website**: https://cakish.pages.dev

## Our Menu

### Strawberry Pavlova
Our signature creation. Crisp meringue base, Dulce de Leche or Nutella filling, hand-piped cream, fresh Irish strawberries arranged in a floral or patisserie sliced pattern.

| Size   | Diameter  | Serves  |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| Small  | 6 inches  | 5–6     |
| Medium | 9 inches  | 8–12    |
| Large  | 12 inches | 13–18   |

Finish options: Floral Finish or Patisserie Sliced Finish
Custom topper message available.

### Heart Pavlova
Heart-shaped pavlova. Crisp meringue base, Dulce de Leche or Nutella filling, hand-piped cream, fresh strawberries.

- Size: 9 inches
- Serves: 8–10
- Custom topper message available.

### Mixed Berries Pavlova
Crisp meringue base, Dulce de Leche or Nutella filling, hand-piped cream, fresh mixed berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries, blackberries).

| Size   | Diameter  | Serves  |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| Small  | 6 inches  | 5–7     |
| Medium | 9 inches  | 8–12    |
| Large  | 12 inches | 13–18   |

Custom topper message available.

### Raspberry Pavlova
Crisp meringue base, Dulce de Leche or Nutella filling, hand-piped cream, fresh whole raspberries.

| Size   | Diameter  | Serves  |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| Small  | 6 inches  | 5–7     |
| Medium | 9 inches  | 8–12    |
| Large  | 12 inches | 13–18   |

Custom topper message available.

## Filling Options

All pavlovas come with a choice of two fillings:

- **Dulce de Leche** — a rich, sweet caramel spread layered between the meringue and cream
- **Nutella** — chocolate hazelnut spread for an indulgent, crowd-pleasing flavour

## How to Order

1. Choose your pavlova variety, size, filling, and optional topper message at https://cakish.pages.dev/order/
2. Send your order via WhatsApp or email to hello@cakish.ie
3. We confirm availability and your collection date
4. Collect from our Wicklow location (address shared after confirmation)

## Occasions

Cakish pavlovas are popular for:
- Birthdays (all ages)
- First Holy Communions
- Confirmations
- Anniversaries
- Valentine's Day (Heart Pavlova)
- Dinner parties and family gatherings
- Corporate events

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Where can I order pavlova in Wicklow?**
Cakish is based in Wicklow, Ireland. Order online at https://cakish.pages.dev/order/ and collect from our Wicklow location.

**Do you deliver?**
We currently offer collection only from Wicklow. Delivery is not available at this time.

**How far in advance should I order?**
We recommend 3–5 days in advance. We take a limited number of orders each week.

**Are your pavlovas gluten-free?**
Pavlova is naturally gluten-free (meringue base is egg whites and sugar). Our kitchen is not a certified gluten-free facility.

**Can I add a custom message?**
Yes — all pavlovas can include a custom topper message.

**What is the difference between Floral Finish and Patisserie Sliced Finish?**
The Floral Finish features whole strawberries thinly sliced and arranged in a sculpted floral pattern — a signature centrepiece presentation. The Patisserie Sliced Finish features precisely sliced strawberries in a clean, contemporary arrangement that is effortless to serve.

## Pages

- Home: https://cakish.pages.dev/
- Order: https://cakish.pages.dev/order/
- Our Story: https://cakish.pages.dev/story/
